scope: Full legacy capability-parity migration: all 4 legacy streams (organizations, organization_networks, organization_devices, organization_admins). The 3 organization-scoped streams use the engine's stream.fan_out dialect (ids_from.request against /organizations, into.path_var) to reproduce legacy's list-organizations-then-fan-out-per-organization read pattern declaratively. Legacy is read-only with no reverse-ETL write target; this bundle stays read-only too.
